content:
SSE in Next.js App Router (nodejs runtime): Use ReadableStream<Uint8Array> with TextEncoder. Set runtime='nodejs' and dynamic='force-dynamic'. Use request.signal abort listener for cleanup. Poll interval set with setInterval, cleared in abort and cancel handlers. Return Response with Content-Type: text/event-stream, Cache-Control: no-cache, X-Accel-Buffering: no. Event format: 'event: name
data: json

'.
